title: Hits & Bits
description: Hits & Bits is a modpack based on the Add-on Actions & Stuff of Bedrock
body:
An overhaul modpack where you can enjoy an Actions & Stuff Environment for Java Edition!

**Features:**
- Visual Effects (Subtle Effects, Particular, Visual Effects+)
- Better Animations (Fresh Animations, Fresh Moves for 1.0 and 1.1 versions)
- 3D Items & Blocks (3D Tools & Utils, Actually 3D Stuff, Fresh Food, 2D Projectiles, etc.)
- Terrain Generation (Tectonic, Geophilic)
- Better Mobs AI (Mob AI tweaks)


This is a client and server modpack with Essential mod, play with your friends :)


This is not an official Java version of the Add-on "Actions & Stuff", it's just a fanmade recreation modpack. Resourcepacks credits are found in the Title Screen Copyright

Warning! It is advisable not to join servers that have their own custom resource pack.
